name: cmd-bridge
description: Safe command shims that route supported searches to high-performance backends with native fallback.

scripts.build:runner: bun build scripts/cmd-bridge-runner.ts --target node --format esm --outfile dist/cmd-bridge-runner.mjs
scripts.build:grep-helper: bun build scripts/grep-fff-helper.ts --target node --format esm --outfile dist/grep-fff-helper.mjs
scripts.build:find-helper: bun build scripts/fff-find-helper.ts --target node --format esm --outfile dist/fff-find-helper.mjs
